description: Canonical end-to-end prediction set after Path A research closure (verdict (a) ROBUST, 2026-05-06). 27 SM + cosmological visible-sector rows: 4 PHYSICAL (gauge couplings, Higgs, Newton G), 12 FRAMEWORK_PREDICTION_FALSIFIED (rank-4 BHOP-2005 SU(4) shadow at κ=0 gives O(TeV) Yukawa eigenvalues + identity CKM, in tension with PDG; plus tree-level Λ_cc), 7 STRUCTURALLY_ABSENT (e^c, ν^c slots empty at degree-1 H^1 of the rank-4 SU(4) shadow). 16 physically-meaningful dark-sector chain slots independent of κ, 6 falsifiability signatures. Provenance chain: shadow Ext^1=0 (831d910c) → dP9 W h^1≥3 (eea6f085) → Z/3xZ/3-invariant H^1=0 (a4e6231e). The κ=0 frame-collapse is the framework's CANONICAL prediction at the rank-4 BHOP-2005 level — not a placeholder pending Ext^1 engagement (Ext^1_full = 0 on the Schoen Z/3xZ/3 quotient is now a definitive theorem).

The framework does NOT encode the charged-lepton sector at this construction level. Falsifiable: any non-zero charged-lepton Yukawa data sourced from the rank-4 BHOP shadow at degree-1 H^1 would falsify this claim.

section_a_sm_parameters.notes: Sits 56.49 orders above observed Lambda; sign flipped (V_min<0; Lambda_obs>0). This is the SM tree-level cosmological-constant problem inherited from any heterotic compactification — Stage 7 loop corrections are an independent stream not closed by Path A.

chain_slots.notes: Dark-photon-like sub-gateway tower mode at order n=5. Mass m = 2*h_eff*alpha_tau^5 = 6.203e-16 GeV. Kinetic mixing eps = alpha_tau^5 = 6.022e-13, satisfies eps < 10^-12 ultralight DP bound.
Dark-photon-like sub-gateway tower mode at order n=6. Mass m = 2*h_eff*alpha_tau^6 = 2.231e-18 GeV. Kinetic mixing eps = alpha_tau^6 = 2.166e-15, satisfies eps < 10^-12 ultralight DP bound.
Dark-photon-like sub-gateway tower mode at order n=7. Mass m = 2*h_eff*alpha_tau^7 = 8.026e-21 GeV. Kinetic mixing eps = alpha_tau^7 = 7.793e-18, satisfies eps < 10^-12 ultralight DP bound.
Dark-photon-like sub-gateway tower mode at order n=8. Mass m = 2*h_eff*alpha_tau^8 = 2.887e-23 GeV. Kinetic mixing eps = alpha_tau^8 = 2.803e-20, satisfies eps < 10^-12 ultralight DP bound.
Dark-photon-like sub-gateway tower mode at order n=9. Mass m = 2*h_eff*alpha_tau^9 = 1.039e-25 GeV. Kinetic mixing eps = alpha_tau^9 = 1.008e-22, satisfies eps < 10^-12 ultralight DP bound.
Dark-photon-like sub-gateway tower mode at order n=10. Mass m = 2*h_eff*alpha_tau^10 = 3.736e-28 GeV. Kinetic mixing eps = alpha_tau^10 = 3.627e-25, satisfies eps < 10^-12 ultralight DP bound.
Dark-photon-like sub-gateway tower mode at order n=11. Mass m = 2*h_eff*alpha_tau^11 = 1.344e-30 GeV. Kinetic mixing eps = alpha_tau^11 = 1.305e-27, satisfies eps < 10^-12 ultralight DP bound.
Unique cycle-1 icosahedral triple-resonance dark slot at k=1. Cycle-2 triple-res slots {31, 41} are above-gateway and lie deep in the empty-slot catalogue (PeV-scale or above).

chain_slots.notes: Hidden W' under mirror-SM UV completion (Stage 6 reading A). Predicts an LHC W' resonance with eps ≈ 8.92e-4 at m ≈ 80 GeV — discoverable at HL-LHC, currently consistent (factor ~10 below CMS/ATLAS null-search reach).
chain_slots.sm_irrep_under_gauge: (1, 3, 0) under hidden SU(2)' (SM-singlet under visible gauge)

chain_slots.notes: Hidden H' under mirror-SM UV completion (Stage 6 reading A'). m_H' must be > m_H/2 = 62.5 GeV to avoid h -> H'H' exotic decay (BR < 0.11 from ATLAS+CMS), so m_H' >= 200 GeV under reading (A'). sin^2(theta_HH') ≈ 2.86e-4 sits factor ~200 below current LHC bound.
chain_slots.sm_irrep_under_gauge: (1, 1, 0) — SM-singlet scalar mixing into 125 GeV Higgs
chain_slots.source_equation: m_H' in [200, 1000] GeV (mirror-SM gauge-Higgs unification shift); sin(theta_HH') = delta_H = 1/59 (Eq. RH)

substrate_corrections.discovery_horizon: HL-LHC sin^2 theta < 0.01 by 2030 — POSITIVE SIGNAL IN REACH

section_c_cosmology.notes: K = 0.12 is a fitted cosmological prefactor anchored to Planck 2018 (Omega_DM h^2 = 0.1200(10)). The structural content is the residual factor (f_5/10^17 GeV)^2 * theta_5^2 * zeta_tower * sqrt(m_5/10^-22 eV) which closes to 1.000(15) — the framework reproduces Planck to within 0.015% with no fitted parameters in the residual. Deriving K from first principles (analogous to Sikivie's QCD-axion misalignment) is an open structural step, NOT a current prediction.
